name: Turnip Sauté
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the turnips.
2. Cook the turnips in a little salted water until just tender. Do not overcook, as this may cause graying.
3. Remove the turnips from the water and sauté them in butter until golden, about 10 minutes.
4. Sprinkle a little sugar over the turnips and cook until it melts.
5. Serves 4
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
Editor: 1974
